_note: The per-document-type support row the panel receives as selectedInvoiceDocumentSupport. submitSupported === false drives the 'unsupported document type' state (the automatic SRI lane pauses, fallback becomes the recommended path). canSubmitElectronicDocument (a separate local derived boolean) drives 'readiness blocked'.

unsupported_remission_guide.label: Guía de remisión
unsupported_remission_guide.detail: La guía de remisión aún no sigue la ruta automática del SRI en esta versión.

_derivedInputs.documentSupportDetail: string | null — blocker/explanation copy shown under the next-step / compatibility area
